title: ChristmasTools
description: Makes Minecraft have more holiday vibes!
body:
This mod supports 3 loaders. Any file ending in `FAB` is a Fabric file, any ending in `NEO` is a NeoForge file, and any ending in `FORGE` is a Forge file.

Minecraft doesn't have much holiday things.. So we made more!!

# INFORMATION
This mod adds more Christmas themed items. **WARNING: THIS MOD IS STILL IN BETA, BUGS ARE LIKELY TO ACCUR**

## WHAT WE ADDED
Presents, Trees, tools, etc.
HOW TO INSTALL/DOWNLOAD
Use a client that supports Fabric, Forge, or NeoForge. Be sure to be on v1.21.8 for Fabric or NeoForge, and v1.20.1 for Forge. Download the latest verions of this mod, (check the tag on it before downloading!) put it in your mods folder, launch your game, then enjoy!

## BUG REPORT/SUPPORT
We have a Discord server for you to get help, report bugs, suggest mods, and suggest things to be added into mods. You can join it here.
